pr.title: feat: Agent Skill System Phase 4 Materialization

comments.body:
![high](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/high-priority.svg)

The `agent_skill.materialize` activity is missing from the activity catalog. Since this PR focuses on Phase 4 (Materialization), this activity must be registered so that Temporal workers can host it.

```python
        TemporalActivityDefinition(
            activity_type="agent_skill.resolve",
            family="agent_skill",
            capability_class="artifacts",
            task_queue=cfg.activity_artifacts_task_queue,
            fleet=ARTIFACTS_FLEET,
            timeouts=TemporalActivityTimeouts(60, 120),
            retries=_activity_retries(max_attempts=3, max_interval_seconds=30),
        ),
        TemporalActivityDefinition(
            activity_type="agent_skill.build_prompt_index",
            family="agent_skill",
            capability_class="artifacts",
            task_queue=cfg.activity_artifacts_task_queue,
            fleet=ARTIFACTS_FLEET,
            timeouts=TemporalActivityTimeouts(60, 120),
            retries=_activity_retries(max_attempts=3, max_interval_seconds=30),
        ),
        TemporalActivityDefinition(
            activity_type="agent_skill.materialize",
            family="agent_skill",
            capability_class="artifacts",
            task_queue=cfg.activity_artifacts_task_queue,
            fleet=ARTIFACTS_FLEET,
            timeouts=TemporalActivityTimeouts(60, 120),
            retries=_activity_retries(max_attempts=3, max_interval_seconds=30),
        ),
```

![high](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/high-priority.svg)

The `agent_skill.materialize` activity is missing from the `TemporalActivityBinding` map. It needs to be bound to its implementation in `AgentSkillsActivities`.

```python
    "agent_skill.resolve": ("agent_skills", "resolve_skills"),
    "agent_skill.build_prompt_index": ("agent_skills", "build_prompt_index"),
    "agent_skill.materialize": ("agent_skills", "materialize"),
```

![high](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/high-priority.svg)

The loop for materializing individual skills is currently empty. While the directory structure and manifest are created, the actual skill content (e.g., from `content_ref`) is not fetched or written to the workspace. This means agents will only see the manifest file but no actual skill instructions, which contradicts the Phase 4 goal of materializing the active snapshot for runtime consumption.

![medium](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/medium-priority.svg)

Failure to write the `active_manifest.json` should be treated as a fatal error for the materialization process. Currently, it only logs a warning and proceeds, which could lead to agents operating with an incomplete or missing skill set configuration.

```suggestion
            except OSError as ex:
                raise RuntimeError(f"AgentSkillMaterializer failed to write active_manifest.json: {ex}") from ex
```

## Code Review

This pull request implements Phase 4 of the Agent Skill System, introducing the core infrastructure for skill resolution and materialization. Key additions include Pydantic schemas for skill snapshots, a resolution service with precedence-based merging, and a materialization service that projects active skills into a run-scoped directory. The changes also integrate these services into Temporal activities and the agent runtime launcher. Feedback identifies that the agent_skill.materialize activity is missing from the catalog and bindings, and the materialization logic currently lacks actual content fetching. Additionally, improvements are suggested for error handling during manifest creation and ensuring idempotency when managing symlinks in the launcher.
